holderBonus.walletLimit: one verified wallet per registered user
holderBonus.creditActivation: after controlled HTTPS account UI is live and wallet balance verification succeeds
holderBonus.creditExpiry: 180 days after ledger activation unless a later published policy extends it
spendRules: credits are account-level service credits only
credits cannot be redeemed for cash, tokens, income, reimbursement, or trading permission
credits cannot bypass Web3 Radar risk controls
credits are consumed only after a requested service is delivered or queued according to the account UI

memberTier.registeredUserLimit: one membership status per registered user
memberTier.walletLimit: one verified wallet per registered user
memberTier.refreshCadence: 30 days after activation, or earlier if the user requests a manual recheck
accessRules: member status is service access only
member status is not cash, tokens, income, reimbursement, voting control, or lifetime access
member status does not activate live trading, leverage, custody, withdrawals, or risk-control bypass
member status can be paused or removed if wallet verification fails, abuse is detected, or support cannot verify account ownership

verification.method: ERC-20 balanceOf read through the Web3 Radar backend after account UI is live

browserPreview.method: MetaMask eth_call ERC-20 balanceOf on Base Mainnet

verification.currentPublicSubmissionMode: copy, download, or email local packet

supportIntake.manualSubmissionMode: copy, download, or email local packet

supportWorkflow.targetFirstResponse: 5-10 business days after controlled intake is live; not a guarantee
supportRules: support will never ask for private keys, seed phrases, exchange API secrets, withdrawal permission, or custody
manual support cannot override wallet-balance verification
manual support cannot promise prices, liquidity, listings, trading results, or audit approval

safeClaims: GCA has published planned holder bonus and GCA Member rules.
The public member page can generate a local pre-registration packet.
The public member page can run a browser-only read-only GCA balance preview with MetaMask eth_call.
The Web3 Radar bridge is prepared but public self-service claiming is not connected.
doNotClaim: credits are claimable before controlled HTTPS account UI is live
GCA Member status is live self-service before the account UI is connected
credits or membership are cash, tokens, income, reimbursement, or trading permission
membership guarantees lifetime access, profit, price support, liquidity, or listings
